title: Skin Reaction TDCommons
description: Binary Classification of Skin Reaction for small Drugs with Extra Trees Classifier and MACCS fingerprints with python and jaqpot software. An Extra Trees classifier was developed to classify whether a drug causes skin reaction or not. The dataset used in this study was retrieved from the ICCVAM (Interagency Coordinating Committee on the Validation of Alternative Methods) report on the rLLNA. The test used to obtain the endpoint is called reduced LLNA (rLLNA) which identifies skin sensitizers by quantifying lymphocyte proliferation.. The train and testing splits were conducted randomly stratified with a 0.7-0.3 ratio. MACCS fingerprints were generated from SMILES and feature selection through correlation, variance threshold and mutual information was implemented. The final model is cross-validated and evaluated on the unseen test set to ensure robustness.
creator: https://ror.org/03cx6bg69
